## Testing

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them -->

- [ ] I have added unit tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] I have run `pytest` locally and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run `ruff check` and `ruff format --check`
- [ ] I have run `mypy` and there are no new type errors
- [ ] I have run `detect-secrets scan` and there are no new secrets

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have updated the changelog (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested this on Python 3.14+
